---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a concrete product, protocol, or developer-experience improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Component

- [ ] Agent
- [ ] Protocol
- [ ] Gateway
- [ ] Control plane
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] Deploy
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Repository/meta

## Problem

What user problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the smallest useful version of the feature.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Scope Notes

- Does this belong in the public self-hosted product?
- Does it change protocol behavior, public APIs, deployment defaults, or licensing boundaries?
- Does it have security or privacy implications?

## Additional Context

Add examples, sketches, links, or prior art if useful.
